name: Ganges Securities Limited
summary: Ganges Securities Limited, through its subsidiaries, engages in the tea and investment business primarily in India. It is involved in tea plantation, manufacturing, and processing activities; and invests and deals in shares, securities, and immovable properties. The company also engages in rental and leasing activities. Ganges Securities Limited was incorporated in 2015 and is headquartered in Kolkata, India.
